en.eNote: Intake logged 3/7 days (Jun 12: 1,715; Jun 13: 1,517; Jun 14: 745 so far). Non-logged days assume the 2,000 kcal plan intake.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories. Non-logged days assume 2,000 kcal. Avg balance ≈ −1,139 kcal/day (Sun in progress).
en.wNote: Bridge available for days with logged meals (Jun 12–14; Sun 14 in progress). Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1: Thursday's barbell squats: 8.1 t over 14 sets (162 reps) — down 39% from Tuesday's 13.2 t hack-squat session. Lower-volume by design after back-to-back leg days; loads still moved at avg HR 109.
en.i2t: Strength HR climbed on the deadlift
en.i2: Avg HR across lifting days: 111 (hack) → 109 (squats) → 116 (trap-bar). Saturday's trap-bar deadlift drove the week's peak effort — max 165 on the 150 kg top set of 12.
en.i3: Friday and Sunday were full off-days, bracketing Saturday's deadlift. RHR sits at the week-low 52 on both Saturday and Sunday — recovery is keeping pace with load.
en.i4: Session max (139–165), avg (109–132) and RHR (52–58) never converge — the gap between RHR and session avg is your aerobic headroom, stable at ~55–75 bpm.
en.rec: Sunday is a rest day after Saturday's trap-bar deadlift (8.8 t, 11 sets, 112 reps; avg 116 / max 165, top set 150×12). The week closed at 5 sessions, 30.1 t, ~436 kcal/day active burn against a logged deficit (Sat balance −1,608). Recovery is green — sleep rebounded to 7h45 (score 86), RHR at the week-low 52. Keep today easy and refuel toward 2,000; optional Z2 hike/swim only if RHR stays off the 58 trigger. Next: Monday swim per plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-08 → 2026-06-14 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.eNote: Unos zabilježen 3/7 dana (12.6.: 1.715; 13.6.: 1.517; 14.6.: 745 zasad). Dani bez zapisa pretpostavljaju planski unos 2.000 kcal.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije. Dani bez zapisa pretpostavljaju 2.000 kcal. Prosj. bilanca ≈ −1.139 kcal/dan (ned u tijeku).
hr.wNote: Most dostupan za dane sa zabilježenim obrocima (12.–14.6.; ned 14. u tijeku). Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Četvrtak (šipka) čučnjevi: 8,1 t kroz 14 serija (162 ponavljanja) — 39% manje od utorkovih 13,2 t (hack squat). Niži volumen namjerno nakon uzastopnih dana za noge; opterećenja i dalje uz prosj. puls 109.
hr.i2t: Puls na snazi rastao na mrtvom dizanju
hr.i2: Prosj. puls na danima dizanja: 111 (hack) → 109 (čučanj) → 116 (trap-bar). Subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje doseglo tjedni vrhunac napora — maks 165 na završnoj seriji 150 kg × 12.
hr.i3: Petak i nedjelja bili su potpuni slobodni dani, oko subotnjeg mrtvog dizanja. RHR na tjednom minimumu 52 i u subotu i u nedjelju — oporavak prati opterećenje.
hr.i4: Maks treninga (139–165), prosjek (109–132) i RHR (52–58) se ne približavaju — razmak RHR-a i prosjeka je aerobna rezerva, stabilno ~55–75 otkucaja.
hr.rec: Nedjelja je dan odmora nakon subotnjeg trap-bar mrtvog dizanja (8,8 t, 11 serija, 112 ponavljanja; prosj. 116 / maks 165, završna 150×12). Tjedan zatvoren s 5 treninga, 30,1 t, ~436 kcal/dan aktivno uz zabilježeni deficit (subotnja bilanca −1.608). Oporavak je zelen — san se oporavio na 7h45 (ocjena 86), RHR na tjednom minimumu 52. Neka danas bude lagano i nadoknadi gorivo prema 2.000; Z2 planina/plivanje samo ako RHR ostane ispod okidača 58. Sljedeće: ponedjeljak plivanje po planu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 8.6. → 14.6.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
